calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am
Judge Pro Tem James Fleming, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Paul McGregor appears in pro per. Respondent, Dulip Atapattu appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleming.

EXHA (1) 3 receipts
EXHA (2) 6 photos
EXHR (A) 1 page statement regarding case

10:18am

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Judgment Entered
